name: just-keep-pathing
description: A 2.5D auto-pathing maze idle game prototype preserved from the original Gemini Canvas HTML.

scripts.check:hidden: node --check src/logic/hidden-rooms.mjs && node --check src/logic/hidden-room-routing.mjs && node --check src/logic/hidden-room-resolution.mjs && node --check src/logic/theme-chain-bonuses.mjs && node --check src/logic/room-reward-calculations.mjs && node --check src/logic/room-reward-plans.mjs && node scripts/check-hidden-room-routing.mjs && node scripts/check-hidden-room-resolution.mjs && node scripts/check-theme-chain-bonuses.mjs && node scripts/check-room-reward-calculations.mjs && node scripts/check-room-reward-plans.mjs
scripts.check:panels: node --check src/view/loading-overlay.mjs && node --check src/view/hud-status-ui.mjs && node --check src/view/header-actions.mjs && node --check src/view/editors/model-editor-chrome.mjs && node --check src/view/settings-panel.mjs && node --check src/view/panels/collection-panel.mjs && node --check src/view/panels/path-debug-panel.mjs && node scripts/check-settings-panel.mjs && node scripts/check-header-actions.mjs && node scripts/check-model-editor-chrome.mjs
scripts.check: npm run check:server && npm run check:data && npm run check:content && npm run check:hidden && npm run check:logic && npm run check:panels && npm run check:app
